violations.description: Keypair generation at module load adds small but avoidable startup cost per spec process.
violations.suggestion: Move shared test keys to reusable fixture setup or static deterministic fixture.

violations.description: Large monolithic test files increase parse and rerun overhead.
violations.suggestion: Split long files into focused suites to reduce rerun scope and improve CI cache locality.

recommendations: Retain API-first setup pattern used in E1 suites
Extract expensive cryptographic setup into fixtures
Split monolithic files to improve selective reruns
summary: Performance posture is strong with no hard waits or serial bottlenecks; only minor startup overhead remains.
